{{Quote|I've been told to have you report to Sergeant Harriet Brunser who will oversee your assault on the Mummers.|[[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Karenna Dunnels|Dunnels]], to a trooper|<ref name="SWG:BTttT" />}}
[[Sergeant/Legends|Sergeant]] '''Harriet Brunser''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Royal Naboo Security Forces/Legends|Royal Naboo Security Forces]] [[Officer/Legends|officer]].<ref name="SWG:BTttT" /> In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]],<ref name="SWG_timeline">{{SWG_timeline}}</ref> she was responsible for planning a raid on the [[Mummers]] who were involved in various [[Terrorist attack in Theed|acts]] of [[Terrorist/Legends|terrorism]] in [[Theed/Legends|Theed]]. She dispatched a number of RSF troopers to [[Raid on the Mummer bunker|attack]] the [[Mummer bunker]] and eliminate its leaders, [[Jaye Hawkson]] and [[Crimsol Vaighn]].<ref name="SWG:BTttT" />

==Behind the scenes==
Harriet Brunser appeared as a [[Wikipedia:Non-player character|non-player character]] in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG:BTttT" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref> Harriet Brunser was added to the game as part of the "[[W:c:swg:Legacy Quest|Legacy Quest]]" with the release of the "[[W:c:swg:Publish 25 Notes for November 15, 2005|Publish 25]]," a.k.a. the "[[W:c:swg:New Game Enhancements|New Game Enhancements]]," on [[November 15]], [[2005]].<ref name="SonyCite-Publish Archive 2005">{{SonyCite|url=players/content.vm?id=64886&resource=publish|text=Publish Archive 2005}}</ref>
